name: Tangler Grenade
description: A tangler grenade is an alchemical, nonmagical item with an ovoid resin shell that shatters on impact. An as action, a creature can throw a tangler grenade at a point up to 60 feet away. Each creature within 10 feet of a shattered tangler grenade must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw or be {@condition restrained} by sticky white webs. As an action, a creature can try to free itself or another creature within its reach from the webs, doing so with a successful {@dc 20} Strength ({@ski
